title: BRepFaceDefinition Object
description: Represents the definition of a B-Rep face that can be used as input to create a BRepBody that includes this face.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

properties.name: associativeID
properties.description: Gets and sets the associate ID of this face definition. This ID will be copied to the corresponding face when the BRepBodyDefinition is used to create a BrepBody. It is used by Fusion as the identifier for the face and is used for tracking this geometry for parametric recomputes.

properties.name: isParamReversed
properties.description: Gets and sets if the normal of this face is reversed with respect to the surface geometry associated with this face definition.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: loopDefinitions
properties.description: Provides access to the BRepLoopDefinitions object associated with this BRepFaceDefinition. It's through the returned collection that you can create new BRepLoopDefinition objects.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: surfaceGeometry
properties.description: Gets and sets the surface geometry associated with this face definition.

related_samples.name: BRep Body definition Sample
related_samples.description: Demonstrates creating BRep bodies by BRepBodyDefinition.

associativeID.title: BRepFaceDefinition.associativeID Property
associativeID.description: Gets and sets the associate ID of this face definition. This ID will be copied to the corresponding face when the BRepBodyDefinition is used to create a BrepBody. It is used by Fusion as the identifier for the face and is used for tracking this geometry for parametric recomputes.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = bRepFaceDefinition_var.associativeID

# Set the value of the property.
bRepFaceDefinition_var.associativeID = propertyValue

classType.title: BRepFaceDefinition.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.
